DataMaskingTip: When enabled, it obfuscates the transmission data in the RSign™ interface. In addition, it prevents users from downloading documents  except the initiator of the transaction. AttachPDFForCCRecipientsTip: Allows sender to specify when PDF documents should be emailed to the Cc recipient. Unsigned – Only the unsigned PDF is emailed to the Cc recipient. Signed – Only the signed PDF is emailed to the Cc recipient. Unsigned and Signed – Both the unsigned and signed PDF is emailed to the Cc recipient. Notifications Only – Only notifications of sending and signing are emailed to Cc recipients, but not the PDF. Notifications and Signed – Notifications and both unsigned and signed PDFs are emailed to the CC recipient.
SignerAttachmentOptionsTip: Specifies whether the signer should be allowed or required to upload attachments or not.

PersonalEnableiManageAccessTip:
If this setting is set to Y, RSign will restrict users to authenticate using SSO or iManage Server depending on the configuration in the iManage platform.
	If this setting is set to N, RSign users can login into RSign with their RSign credentials or authenticate via RSign SSO. Login via Other option to authenticate against the iManage server will not be allowed.
SignInSequenceTip: When enabled, RSign™ invites recipients to sign in the sequence they were added to the SEND tab. When disabled, all the recipients receive the invitation simultaneously.

RPOST®, RMAIL®, RSIGN®, RFORMS™, (R)®, (R)EGISTERED EMAIL(TM), REGISTERED EMAIL(TM), REGISTERED RECEIPT(TM), LEGAL PROOF®, ESIGNOFF®, SIDENOTE® un CERTIFIED EMAIL(TM) ir RPost tirdzniecības zīmes, kas ir reģistrētas Amerikas Savienotajās Valstīs, kā arī reģistrētas un nereģistrētas tirdzniecības zīmes pasaules valstīs. Ar šo tīmekļa vietni saistītajās tīmekļa vietnes lapās atsauces uz dažādiem citiem uzņēmumiem un produktiem ir iekļautas ar to tirdzniecības nosaukumiem un logotipiem. Vairumā gadījumu, taču ne visos gadījumos, attiecīgie uzņēmumi pieprasa šos apzīmējumus norādīt kā tirdzniecības nosaukumus vai reģistrētas tirdzniecības zīmes. Šie tirdzniecības nosaukumi un logi šajā tīmekļa vietnē ir norādīti tikai ilustratīvos nolūkos.

lang_VerifyYourEmailMobileFirstSigner: Step 1 of 2 is complete. You will receive a SMS message from RSign  on your mobile  with a verification link, and an email with a link in your inbox. Please check and click any one of the links and confirm to complete step 2 of the transaction.
FilingFinalSignedDocumentsTip: Specifies how the final signed documents should be stored in iManage and NetDocuments. The versioning option stores the final signed document in the same folder as the original document but as a new version number. The new documents (no versioning) option allows you to choose the folder location within iManage or NetDocuments.
lang_ValidAssignedToAll: Nepieciešamo pielikumu saņēmēji nevar būt Jebkurš
AttachXMLToSenderOnlyTip: When enabled, the XML document is attached to the final signed and completed document.
DisableDownloadOptionOnSignersPageTip: When enabled, the icon to download the unsigned document will be hidden on the document signing page
DisclaimerLocationTip: Specify the location of the disclaimer within the email body. Top of email body places the disclaimer above the  email message. Below email body places the disclaimer below the email message. Bottom of email places the text at the end of the email.
SendReminderUntilExpirationtoSenderTip: Specifies how frequently the senders should be reminded about expiring envelopes.
AllowSignerstoDownloadFinalContractToolT: When enabled, RSign allows the signer to download the final signed contract from the Completed folder of their RSign account by enabling the download icon. The download icon will also be enabled in the popup shown to the last signer in a multi-party e-Signature request, after they have finished submitting the document.
lang_thenReminderDaysValidation: Tādā gadījumā atgādinājumam jābūt īsākam par
CopyTemplateConfirm: Vai tiešām vēlaties kopēt atlasīto veidni?
lang_warnContractPermanentDelete: Vai tiešām vēlaties neatgriezeniski dzēst šo vienumu?
AcceptTS: Apstiprināta pakalpojuma noteikumus un turpināt pierakstīšanās procesu...
OverWriteText: Datnē, kuru jūs mēģināt  augšupielādēt, atrodas duplicēts(-i) kontakts(-i). Vai jūs vēlaties pārrakstīt esošo(-s) kontaktu(-us)?
lang_RuleDelConfirm: Vai tiešām vēlaties dzēst noteikumu ar noteikuma nosaukumu
AppliedEpicAPIServerURLToolTip: Enter the Applied Epic SDK URL. It’s a unique endpoint given to Applied epic customers who have purchased their SDK licence. Contact your applied epic representative to get the SDK URL.
ClickToMoveRight: Click on this arrow to move the control panel to right
EnvelopeAccepted: Šis dokuments jau ir parakstīts un atgriezts sūtītājam.
PinToBottom: Click to pin the control panel to bottom
DeclineEnvelopeTip: Allows users to customize the envelope signature declination reasons.
companylevelsettingonly: This is a company level setting only. Envelope level setting is displayed for information purpose.
ShowRSignLogoTip: Allows companies to hide or show the RSign™ logo in email banners. This change must be done by the RSign™ Customer Success team only.
SignatureCertificateDocumentFormatTip: Specifies the nomenclature of the signature certificate when stored as a separate document in NetDocuments or iManage. This setting is disabled if setting Sending -> Include Signature Certificate on PDF is set to Y.
SignatureCertificateDocumentFormatToolTi: Specifies the nomenclature of the signature certificate.
lang_UserNotificationAlert: Lietotājs nav saistīts ar uzņēmumu, tādēļ nevar būt administrators.
AllowUsersToAlignFormFieldTip: When enabled, RSign™ displays icons to align control fields on the document.
SignerAttachmentContent: Lai aplūkotu, lejupielādētu parakstītāja pievienoto dokumentu, noklikšķiniet uz tālāk esošās saites.
ThankYouSessionTextOnMobileConfirm: Thank you for verifying your mobile number. Your signatures have been recorded. You will receive an SMS on your mobile with instructions to download the final signed document after all the signers have signed the document.
IncludeTransparencyDocumentTip: When enabled, the sender receives an attachment called the "Transparency PDF" once all parties have signed a document. The "Transparency PDF" is sent to the sender and the final signed contract. It contains only the information the signers added to the form fields during the signing process.
EnvelopeExpirationRemindertoSenderTip: Specifies how long (in days) before the document expiration date will the sender be first reminded there are documents awaiting to be signed.
title_loadEnvelopeHistory: Noklikšķiniet šeit, lai ielādētu aploksnes vēsturi
IsDefaultSignatureRequiredForStaticTempl: Statiskajai veidnei ir nepieciešams paraksta kontroles noklusējums
DGPostSignPopupDesc: The copy of this document has been saved to your RSign account. Please select from the options below, how would you like to proceed further?

ReminderTypeTooltip: Specify whether the reminder should be sent to recipients mobile number or email address.
SendDocuments: Access of copy of e-signed records.

lang_TemplateGroupDelConfirm: Vai  tiešām vēlaties dzēst veidņu grupu ar grupas nosaukumu
lang_documentEmailMobileSent: Your signatures are recorded. You will receive an email or SMS from RSign with instructions to access the signed document.
lang_EnterEmailSearchStr: Enter email of the user to view their settings (to view company settings click search with no text).
lang_mutliEmailErrorMsg: Daži no e-pastiem nav veiksmīgi pievienoti. Lūdzu, mēģiniet vēlreiz.
StoreOriginalDocumentTip: When enabled, RSign™ stores the original document and lets the user download it from the Envelopes tab. When disabled, RSign™ does not store the original document.
DaysBeforeFirstReminderTip: Specifies the minimum number of days after which the first reminder to sign should be sent to the signer.
NotificationAndSignedTooltip: Notifications and Signed – Notifications and both unsigned and signed PDFs are emailed to the CC recipient.
CompanyHistory: You are Viewing Company Setting History
UploadPictureSignature: Upload a picture of your signature (PNG, JPEG, JPG, BMP)

eSignExpiredServiceFeature: Lai iegūtu plašāku informāciju, sazinieties ar nosūtītāju vai veiciet jauninātas versijas nosūtīšanu.

EnvelopeRejectedWithMail: Aploksne ir noraidīta un sūtītājam nosūtīts e-pasta paziņojums.

FirstDayTip: Select the date from which RSign™ should copy or re-route emails sent to you.
SignatureRequestReplyAddressTip: Specifies the default email reply-to address to be shown in the 'To' field when the recipient replies to the e-signature request email.
DefaultCountryCodeToolTip: The selected country code value is defaulted on the SEND tab when the sender selects their contacts.
NotValidUrl: Lūdzu iesniedziet derīgu pēcparakstīšanas mērķlapas URL

InValidEmailAddressText: Sekojošajam(-iem) kontakta(-iem) ir nederīga(-as) e-pasta adrese(-es), lūdzu, izlabojiet un augšupielādējiet.
lang_ValMaxFileSize: Atļauti ne vairāk kā 10 faili ar kopējo pielikumu apjomu 15 MB
UploadSignedDocumentTip: Enable this feature to store the final signed documents and signature certificate in your iManage or NetDocuments accounts.
ConfirmEnvelopeDelete: Vai tiešām vēlaties dzēst šīs aploksnes?
EnvelopeTimeDateStampLocationTip: Prints the date and time on the signature certificate at the specified location. Possible values: Left footer, Right footer, Left header, and Right header. The 'No Print' option does not print the timestamp.
DeletingContactText: Vai jūs tiešām vēlaties izdzēst kontaktu?
EnableAutoFillTextControls: Iespējot tās pašas iezīmes autoaizpildes teksta vadīklas
StampWatermarkOntoSignersCompletedDocume: When enabled, RSign™ stamps a watermark onto the signed document.
AddresstoReRouteAllRSignEmailsTip: Email address where email received from RSign™ should be routed.
lang_removeAllControls: Šī darbība dzēsīs visas dokumenta kontroles. Vai vēlaties turpināt?
SendAConfirmationEmailToValidateFirstSig: When enabled, an email is sent to the first signer of an RForm (a template accessible for signature through a static URL) for authentication purposes.
EnvelopeExpiredGDPRSettings: Envelope expired based on GDPR settings
ConfirmShareTemplate: Please select the options below for sharing.
RequiredConfirmation: NEPIECIEŠAMS: procesa pabeigšanai pārbaudiet savu iesūtni un verifikācijas e-pastā noklikšķiniet uz apstiprinājuma saites.
CompanySettings: Šis ir tikai uzņēmuma līmeņa iestatījums. Aploksnes līmeņa iestatījums tiek parādīts informācijas nolūkos.
TransparencyContentN: Atvērt pievienoto caurskatāmības dokumentu vai pievienotā caurskatāmības dokumenta apskatīšanai, lejupielādēšanai vai izdrukāšanai noklikšķiniet uz tālāk esošās saites.
DocumentSizeMsg: Izmēra ierobežojumu dēļ mēs nevaram pievienot dokumentu(-us).
UnsignedTooltip: Unsigned - Only the unsigned PDF is emailed to the Cc recipient.
FileReviewStandardTemplate: The attachment will be sent using the RSign File Review feature to allow the recipient to download, review and confirm that they have reviewed the content.
SelectInviteSignerAndSignNow: Please select any one Invite signer/Sign Now
UploadDocumentValidation: Please upload the requested mandatory documents.
EnvelopeUpdating: Sūtītājs šobrīd jaunina dokumentu. Lūdzu, mēģiniet vēlreiz pēc īsa brīža.
AllowUsersToCreateAndUseRulesTip: When enabled, administrators and users can create new rules and use existing rules.
AccessAuthenticationTip: Specifies if and how the document should be protected before and after it is signed. The value of this setting is printed on the signature certificate to provide proof of secure delivery.  If “End-to-End” is selected, a password will be required for the recipient to view and sign the document and to view the final signed document. If “Required to Open Signed” is selected, a password will be needed to open the signed document. If “Signer Authentication” is selected the signer will be required to enter a six digit code sent to their email. If Select is selected, the user can access the document without entering any password.
lang_VerifyYourMobileFirstSigner: Step 1 of 2 is complete. You will receive a SMS message from RSign on your mobile to verify your mobile number. Please check the message  and confirm to complete step 2 of the transaction.
SendIndividualSignatureNotificationsTip: When enabled, the sender/Cc receives an email notification each time a recipient signs the document. When disabled, RSign™ notifies the sender/Cc once after all the signers have signed the document.
ClickOnCreateEnvelope: For sending an envelope to the selected record click on "Send Envelope".
lang_DocumentFormatChangedWarning: At least one signer input field is outside the margin of the page. Please review the signer input fields on pages X to move it inside the margin.
lang_BackConfirmationS1: Click on this to go to Page 2/3 after saving all the changes.
EnableSSOforiManageTip:
If this setting is set to Y, users under your company will be able to authenticate themselves against the iManage authentication server from the RSign Homepage by clicking the ‘Other options’ button to access the RSign application. Enabling this setting will show the same setting at the personal level to allow users to select if they prefer to access RSign with RSign credentials or iManage Authentication mechanism (SSO or iManage credentials). Moreover, if SSO is enabled at RPortal for your company and a domain is configured, new users navigating to RSign from iManage will be auto-created and placed under your Company account.
If this setting is set to N, new users navigating to RSign from iManage will be auto-created under a default account.
EmailNotFoundinEnvelopes: The email address was not found in the envelopes.
title_accessAuthPwd: Ievadiet piekļuves kodu vai atstājiet tukšu
FinalContractStaticDocContent: Lai aplūkotu, lejupielādētu vai izdrukātu dokumentu, noklikšķiniet uz tālāk esošās saites.
SendSingleSignerConfirmationEmailMobileT: RSign will send a confirmation email to your email address or an SMS with a link to your mobile number, based on your selection below. Please locate the email or SMS and click the confirmation link to complete the signer's verification.
DeleteFinalContractDisplayMsg: Parakstītais līgums ir dzēsts no RSign servera.
Allow Users to Create and Use Template G: Atļaut lietotājiem izveidot un izmantot veidņu grupas.
SignerAttachmentContentN: Atveriet parakstītāja pievienoto dokumentu vai parakstītāja pievienotā dokumenta apskatīšanai vai lejupielādēšanai noklikšķiniet uz tālāk esošās saites.
